summary: Recording suffers a major cut, missing most of the second verse of Fire on the Mountain, making it largely disappointing.
review: The release is hampered by a significant edit that removes about a minute of Fire on the Mountain, including the bulk of its second verse. Reviewers note this loss as a serious flaw, and no other performance details are highlighted, indicating an overall unsatisfying listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one low‑star review mentioning a major missing segment; the show quality is compromised and recording lacks completeness.

recording_quality.technical_notes: A minute of Fire on the Mountain is cut, removing most of the second verse; no other sound quality comments provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The missing portion of Fire on the Mountain disrupts the set flow and detracts from overall enjoyment.
